---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for SupportOps
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: sonnymay
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the frustration or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Use Case

Who benefits from this feature, and how would they use it? 

> Example: "As a support agent, I want to bulk-close resolved tickets so I don't have to close them one by one."

## Alternatives Considered

Have you thought of other ways to solve this problem? Why is your proposed solution better?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or examples from other tools that inspired this request?
